data.title: What's Going On With Reddit Stock Tuesday?
data.description:
Analysts Maintain Ratings, Cut Targets

Truist Securities analyst Youssef Squali reiterated a Buy rating on Reddit, lowering his price target to $260 from $275. Meanwhile, Wells Fargo analyst Alec Brondolo maintained an Equal-Weight rating and cut his target to $149 from $196.

Insider Selling Disclosed In SEC Filings

Reddit Technical Analysis

At $138.50, Reddit is trading 2.8% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA), the stock’s average price over the last 20 sessions, which suggests short-term stabilization after recent selling pressure. At the same time, it’s trading 24.9% below its 100-day SMA, which indicates the intermediate trend is still pointed down.

The moving average convergence divergence (MACD), a trend/momentum measure, is at -4.8022 versus a signal line of -6.3179, a bullish alignment that suggests downside momentum is easing even if the trend hasn’t fully repaired. The death cross in March (50-day SMA falling below the 200-day SMA) is still an overhead technical headwind, often consistent with rallies facing supply.

Over the last 12 months, the stock is up 50.35%, which is backward-looking and shows the name has still delivered big swings despite the current drawdown. Within the 52-week range ($79.75 to $282.95), the stock is well off the highs, which suggests the market is still repricing expectations after last year’s peak.

  • Key Resistance: $147.50 — an area where recent rebounds have tended to stall.
  • Key Support: $131.50 — a level where buyers have recently shown up to defend pullbacks.

Reddit Earnings & Analyst Outlook

Looking further out, the next major catalyst for the stock arrives with the April 30, 2026 (estimated) earnings report.

  • EPS Estimate: 59 cents (Up from 13 cents)
  • Revenue Estimate: $609.74 million (Up from $392.36 million)
  • Valuation: P/E of 52.8x (Indicates premium valuation)

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions: The stock carries a Buy Rating with an average price target of $234.65. Recent analyst moves include:

  • Wells Fargo: Equal-Weight (Lowers Target to $149.00) (April 7)
  • Truist Securities: Buy (Lowers Target to $260.00) (April 7)
  • B of A Securities: Neutral (Lowers Target to $175.00) (April 2)

Reddit Benzinga Edge Rankings

Below is the Benzinga Edge scorecard for Reddit, highlighting its strengths and weaknesses compared to the broader market:

  • Value: Weak (Score: 15.69) — Trading at a steep premium relative to peers.
  • Growth: Strong (Score: 98.4) — High growth potential indicated by strong metrics.
  • Momentum: Weak (Score: 16.12) — Stock is underperforming the broader market.

The Verdict: Reddit’s Benzinga Edge signal reveals a mixed profile with weak value and momentum scores, but strong growth potential. This indicates that while the stock may be overvalued, its growth metrics suggest future upside if managed effectively.

Reddit Top ETF Exposure

Significance: Because RDDT carries such a heavy weight in these funds, any significant inflows or outflows for these ETFs will likely force automatic buying or selling of the stock.

Reddit Price Action

RDDT Price Action: Reddit shares were up 1.06% at $139.81 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: The Masters Is Here, Could Golf Stocks Be A Portfolio Hole-In-One?
data.description:
You're about to tee off at the Augusta National Golf Club with a Pinnacle golf ball using a Titleist driver, wearing a Foot Joy glove and golf shoes, as well as KJUS golf shorts, shirt and jacket.

In just that moment, Acushnet Holdings Corp. (NYSE:GOLF), which owns all of those brands, has shown how it has infiltrated every aspect of your golf game. 

Well, maybe not that bogey on the 11th hole (Augusta's notorious White Dogwood hole.)

• Why is going on with GOLF stock today?

The Rise of Golf

Golf, as few sports have done, has managed to create a cult-like status while weathering controversies such as LIV Golf and PGA merger (still in limbo) and assorted cheating and gambling scandals, while having explosive growth.

According to the National Golf Foundation, "Green-grass golf participation surpassed 29 million in 2025 (all-time record is 30.6 million in 2003), marking an eighth consecutive year of growth and a net increase of roughly one million golfers year-over-year.”

The foundation also noted that with approximately 16,000 courses at nearly 14,000 facilities, the U.S. maintains its position as the world's largest golf market.

Golf Companies Get Into the Swing of Things

While a few golf companies are still private — such as TaylorMade, Ping and PXG — there are a number that either are pure-play golf or have some sort of golf exposure, be it via clothing, footwear or other related items.

Acushnet Holdings, with some of the biggest and well-known brands, has held a somewhat steadier, consistent performance; its stock is up over $115% over the past five years.

Among Callaway's current brands are Callaway Golf (clubs, balls and other accessories), Odyssey (among the top putters in the world), Travis Mathew (golf apparel and lifestyle) and OGIO (specializes in durable, specialized storage solutions golf and other sports).

Callaway stock, after a steady decline since 2022, hitting a bottom in 2025, has rebounded and is now up more than $148% over the past year. 

Much of this upward swing is credited to the Topgolf sale and restructuring, according to a Golf Week article.

Note: This chart ends on Jan. 2026, when Callaway switched its ticker from MODG to CALY.

Chipping Into Golf

After these two companies, there are several sports-related ones that have exposure in golf. 

Nike's (NYSE:NKE) has had a complicated relationship with golf. In 2016, the company ditched what is called golf hard goods (golf clubs and balls) to focus on golf apparel and footwear. 

"It's a fairly simple equation, that we lost money for 20 years on equipment and balls. We realized next year wasn't going to be any different," said company co-founder Phil Knight on Bloomberg Television.

Puma SE Unsponsored ADR (OTC:PUMSY) is the owner of Cobra Golf, but it is a small segment of the company. 

Dick’s Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE:DKS) sells golf gear and owns brands such as Top-Flite, which it bought from Callaway Golf in 2012.

Teeing Off

Vici Properties, a real estate investment trust probably best known for its gaming destinations, also owns four championship golf courses in the U.S., consisting of Cascata and Serket in Las Vegas, Chariot Run in Indiana and Grand Bear (designed by Jack Nicklaus) in Mississippi. The properties are located near the company's gaming properties.

Similar to Vici Properties, Vail's golf courses are associated with a larger property. In this case, ski resorts. Courses include Red Sky Golf Club, Beaver Creek Golf Club, Canyons Golf in Park City and Keystone's Ranch and River.

Walt Disney Co (NYSE:DIS) is also part of the golf game, with courses at its Walt Disney World Resort in Orlando, Fla. 

The Masters: How to Watch It

The Masters Golf Tournament at Augusta National is April 9-12 (practice rounds started on April 6) and is airing on Walt Disney-owned ESPN for the first and second rounds, while Amazon.com Inc.'s Prime will stream early round coverage. Comcast-owned CBS (and Paramount+ for streaming) is airing the third and final rounds. The tournament will also stream on Masters.com.

Photo: Photoongraphy via Shutterstock

data.title: Infosys Pushes AI Adoption With New Harness Partnership For Faster Results
data.description:
• Infosys stock is gaining positive traction. Why is INFY stock advancing?

AI Partnership With Harness

Infosys partnered with Harness to advance agentic AI-led software delivery, combining Infosys Topaz Fabric and Infosys Cobalt with the Harness Software Delivery Platform.

The integration is designed to improve productivity, strengthen AI governance and reduce time-to-market by automating and standardizing the software delivery lifecycle.

Automation and Efficiency Gains

The companies said the approach targets inefficiencies in testing, deployment, security, and reliability, where engineering teams often rely on fragmented and manual processes.

The collaboration introduces AI-driven automation and context-aware intelligence to streamline operations from code to production and reduce operational risk.

Enterprise Deployment and Commentary

The joint offering will support large-scale modernization programs, particularly in complex, regulated environments with capabilities that enable consistent deployment across hybrid and multi-cloud systems.

"As AI accelerates change, enterprises need delivery systems that are faster, more reliable and governed by design. Our collaboration with Harness combines Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt offerings to help clients unlock AI value and translate their AI ambition into scalable, reliable execution — with trust and governance built in," said CEO Salil Parekh.

INFY Technical Levels: Key Support and Resistance to Watch

At $14.03, Infosys is trading 5% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA), the stock's average price over the past 20 sessions, which suggests near-term selling pressure has eased.

The stock is also trading 14.2% below its 100-day SMA, indicating the intermediate trend remains down.

The moving average convergence divergence (MACD), a trend/momentum measure, shows MACD at -0.3482 versus a signal line at -0.5169, a bullish alignment that often reflects improving momentum off a low base.

Over the past 12 months, the stock is down 16.30%, which frames the current bounce as a recovery attempt inside a longer drawdown, not a confirmed reversal.

Infosys is also much closer to its $12.57 52-week low than its $30 high, which is consistent with a market still pricing in skepticism.

  • Key Resistance: $14.50 — a nearby area where rebounds can stall if buyers don't follow through.
  • Key Support: $14 — a line the stock is currently leaning on as a short-term floor.

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions

The stock carries a Hold Rating with an consensus price target of $17.87. Recent analyst moves include:

  • TD Cowen: Hold (Lowers target to $15 on April 6)
  • Stifel: Hold (Lowers target to $17 on Feb. 18)
  • TD Cowen: Hold (Raises target to $18 on Jan. 15)

INFY Stock Scorecard: Growth, Value, Quality

Below is the Benzinga Edge scorecard for Infosys, highlighting its strengths and weaknesses compared to the broader market:

The Verdict: The Infosys Benzinga Edge signal reveals a quality-leaning setup with weak momentum and below-average growth. That mix often fits a "prove it" phase, where the chart needs sustained follow-through before the fundamentals get re-rated.

Top ETF Exposure

Significance: Because Infosys carries significant weight in these funds, any significant inflows or outflows will likely trigger automatic buying or selling of the stock.

INFY Stock Price Activity: Infosys shares were up 1.68% at $13.95 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo by Jonathan Weiss via Shutterstock

data.title: What's Going On With Planet Labs Stock Today?
data.description:
• Where are PL shares going?

Planet Labs recently reported the successful deployment of AI-driven object detection on its Pelican satellite, utilizing Nvidia Jetson technology. This advancement aims to enhance Earth intelligence capabilities, allowing for near real-time insights and quicker responses to changes on the planet.

This news comes as the broader market is experiencing a mixed day, with the S&P 500 down 1% and the Communication Services sector losing 0.5%, adding pressure to the stock’s performance as it navigates these broader market trends rather than company-specific factors.

Technical Analysis

At $34.25, the stock is trading 15.7% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 28.9% above its 50-day SMA, indicating strong short-term momentum. However, it is also trading 54.6% above its 100-day SMA, suggesting a robust intermediate trend, but this could also mean the stock is vulnerable to a pullback if market conditions worsen.

The relative strength index (RSI) is currently at 61.81, which is neutral, indicating that the stock is neither overbought nor oversold at this time. The moving average convergence divergence (MACD) is bullish, with the MACD line at 2.1624 above the signal line at 1.8054, suggesting positive momentum.

  • Key Resistance: $37 — This level has previously acted as a barrier for upward movement.

Planet Labs has shown an impressive 12-month return of 945.25%, reflecting strong investor interest and growth potential over the past year. The stock’s current price is near its 52-week high of $37.05, indicating that it is trading at elevated levels, which may attract profit-taking if market sentiment shifts.

Sector Performance

Planet Labs’ recent advancements in AI integration are crucial for Planet Labs as they enhance its offerings and position in the competitive landscape of Earth intelligence. By improving the speed and accuracy of insights, the company aims to differentiate itself and provide greater value to its customers.

Earnings & Analyst Outlook

Looking further out, the next major catalyst for the stock arrives with the June 3 (estimated) earnings report.

  • Revenue Estimate: $89.99 million (Up from $66.27 million)

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions: The stock carries a Buy Rating with a consensus price target of $18.12. Recent analyst moves include:

  • Citigroup: Buy (Raises target to $35 on April 2)
  • Morgan Stanley: Equal-Weight (Raises target to $35 on March 25)
  • Clear Street: Buy (Raises target to $34 on March 20)

Top ETF Exposure

Significance: Because Planet Labs carries significant weight in these funds, any significant inflows or outflows for these ETFs will likely encourage automatic buying or selling of the stock.

Price Action

PL Stock Price Activity: Planet Labs shares were up 1.03% at $35.38 at the time of publication on Tuesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo: PJ McDonnell via Shutterstock
